query: What is the first-line treatment for Type 2 Diabetes?
response:
The first-line treatment for Type 2 Diabetes is metformin, unless contraindicated or not tolerated, in which case a sulfonylurea may be used.

SOURCES:
- guideline-170-en.pdf (Page: 392)
- World Health Organization. Classiﬁcation of Diabetes Mellitus. World Health Organization; 2019 [Accessed October 19, 2023].https://iris.who.int/handle/10665/325182
